thesis: Telecom/optical-fibre capex upcycle with exceptional 6m-1m momentum confirmed by strongly rising analyst revisions; momentum-led book's purest expression this round.
falsification: Momentum z falls below peer median or revisions turn down for two consecutive months, or it underperforms NIFTY 500 by >10% over the holding period.

thesis: Order-book-driven momentum in precision manufacturing, confirmed by rising analyst revisions — momentum and ARM agree strongly.
falsification: Order intake disappoints, revisions roll over, or price momentum z drops below 2.

thesis: Freight-rate cycle support; one of the few candidates where momentum, cheapness and rising revisions all align positively.
falsification: Freight rates collapse, or revisions fade while the stock is no longer cheap vs peers.

thesis: Power-T&D capex tailwind with momentum and rising revisions reinforcing each other.
falsification: Power-capex orders slow, momentum z turns negative, or revisions decline.

thesis: Content-per-vehicle and export momentum with supportive rising revisions.
falsification: Auto-cycle rollover, momentum z below 1, or revisions turn down.

thesis: Domestic-manufacturing surveillance demand with momentum confirmed by strongly rising revisions.
falsification: Revisions fade or momentum z drops below 1.

thesis: Specialty-chemicals demand momentum confirmed by rising revisions.
falsification: Momentum z below 1 or revisions decline for two months.

thesis: Generator/power-equipment order momentum with supportive revisions.
falsification: Order momentum stalls, momentum z below 1, or revisions roll over.

thesis: Grid/energy-transition capex with momentum and rising revisions; large-cap ballast for the industrials sleeve.
falsification: Capex cycle slows or revisions turn down.

thesis: EMS/PCB demand momentum confirmed by rising revisions.
falsification: Momentum z below 1 or revisions decline.

thesis: Pipe order-book momentum with rising revisions and no valuation stretch.
falsification: Order momentum fades or revisions turn down.

thesis: Defence + auto-forgings momentum confirmed by rising revisions.
falsification: Momentum z below 0.5, revisions roll over, or defence/export orders disappoint.

thesis: Injectables recovery with strongly rising analyst revisions.
falsification: Revisions turn down or US-injectables pricing pressure resumes.

thesis: Garment-export momentum with strongly rising revisions.
falsification: Export demand softens or revisions decline.

falsification: Volumes/derivative turnover fall or revisions roll over.

thesis: Options-volume-driven momentum with supportive revisions.
falsification: Volume momentum stalls or revisions decline.

thesis: Housing/electrification cable demand momentum with rising revisions.
falsification: Momentum z below 1 or revisions turn down.

thesis: Niche-pharma momentum with rising revisions and reasonable valuation.
falsification: Pipeline/litigation setback or revisions decline.

thesis: Eyewear-retail structural growth with strongly rising analyst revisions; the best-supported name in my existing consumption book.
falsification: Revisions turn down or post-IPO momentum breaks below peer median.

thesis: Beauty/e-commerce monetisation with strongly rising revisions.
falsification: Revisions roll over or momentum z falls clearly negative.

thesis: Demand/margin recovery flagged by strongly rising revisions ahead of price.
falsification: Revisions fade or volume growth disappoints again.

thesis: Value-fashion expansion story intact; moderate revisions support a held position.

thesis: Grocery-retail scale story; held smaller pending a momentum re-acceleration.

falsification: Volume growth or revisions deteriorate.

thesis: Premiumisation + EV two-wheeler momentum; held at lower size.
